---
title: "scraping"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
# ---------------------------------------
# LIBRERÍAS
# ---------------------------------------
library(rvest)
library(tidyverse)
library(here)

message("Iniciando scraping OEA...")

# ---------------------------------------
# CREAR CARPETA DATA
# ---------------------------------------
dir.create(here("TP2/data"), showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# ---------------------------------------
# PARÁMETROS
# ---------------------------------------
meses <- 1:4
base_url <- "https://www.oas.org/es/centro_noticias/comunicados_prensa.asp"

tabla_noticias <- list()
id <- 1

# ---------------------------------------
# LOOP POR MESES
# ---------------------------------------
for (mes in meses) {
  
  message("Mes: ", mes)
  
  url <- paste0(base_url, "?nMes=", mes, "&nAnio=2026")
  
  pagina <- read_html(url)
  
  # ---------------------------------------
  # EXTRAER LINKS CORRECTAMENTE
  # ---------------------------------------
  links <- pagina %>%
    html_elements("a") %>%
    html_attr("href")
  
  # eliminar NA
  links <- links[!is.na(links)]
  
  # eliminar vacíos
  links <- links[links != ""]
  
  # filtrar solo comunicados reales
  links <- links[str_detect(links, "comunicado_prensa.asp\\?sCodigo=")]
  
  # convertir a links completos
  links <- ifelse(
    str_detect(links, "^http"),
    links,
    paste0("https://www.oas.org", links)
  )
  
  # eliminar duplicados
  links <- unique(links)
  
  # chequeo opcional
  print(links[1:5])
  
  # ---------------------------------------
  # LOOP DE NOTICIAS
  # ---------------------------------------
  for (link in links) {
    
    message("Procesando: ", link)
    
    noticia <- tryCatch(
      read_html(link),
      error = function(e) {
        message("Error en: ", link)
        return(NULL)
      }
    )
    
    if (is.null(noticia)) next
    
    # ---------------------------------------
    # EXTRAER TITULO
    # ---------------------------------------
    titulo <- noticia %>%
      html_element("h1") %>%
      html_text(trim = TRUE)
    
    # ---------------------------------------
    # EXTRAER CUERPO
    # ---------------------------------------
    cuerpo <- noticia %>%
      html_elements("p") %>%
      html_text(trim = TRUE) %>%
      paste(collapse = " ")
    
    # ---------------------------------------
    # GUARDAR EN LISTA
    # ---------------------------------------
    tabla_noticias[[id]] <- tibble(
      id = id,
      titulo = titulo,
      cuerpo = cuerpo
    )
    
    id <- id + 1
    
    Sys.sleep(2)
  }
}

# ---------------------------------------
# TABLA FINAL
# ---------------------------------------
datos_oea <- bind_rows(tabla_noticias)

# ---------------------------------------
# GUARDAR
# ---------------------------------------
saveRDS(datos_oea, here("TP2/data/datos_oea.rds"))


```
